introSection: Giant Inverted Boomerang was a steel inverted shuttle roller coaster previously located Jin Jiang Action Park in Xuhui, Shanghai, China. It was built by Vekoma.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in late 2011.

The ride closed on 25 January 2025. It was removed toward the start of summer.

fullText:
Giant Inverted Boomerang was a steel inverted shuttle roller coaster previously located Jin Jiang Action Park in Xuhui, Shanghai, China. It was built by Vekoma.

The ride opened in late 2011.

The ride closed on 25 January 2025. It was removed toward the start of summer.

See Giant Inverted Boomerang.
